name: Orange Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first four crust ingredients in a bowl. Rub the butter into the mixture until it is crumbly.
2. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 7-8 inch springform pan.
3. In a small saucepan, sprinkle gelatin over water and let stand about 5 minutes to soften.
4. Place over low heat, stirring until gelatin dissolves. Let cool to room temperature.
5. In a food processor or blender, combine cottage cheese, orange juice, rind, banana, sweetener, lemon juice, and dissolved gelatin. Puree until smooth (mash cottage cheese, banana with sweetener, juices, and gelatin).
6. Pour the mixture over the prepared crust. Cover and chill 2-4 hours or until set.
7. At serving time, remove the side from the pan. With a wide metal lifter, slip the cheesecake off the bottom of the pan onto a serving plate or leave on the base of the springform pan.
8. Peel the orange, removing pith and thin membrane. Remove sections.
9. Slice strawberries or grapes. Arrange on top of the cheesecake along with orange slices.
